# aRt

aRt is an R package to create generative art.

## Installation

Install from GitHub using:

### Colour palettes

Some of the functions in previous releases of the `aRt` package took
names of colour palettes as arguments. These colour palettes came from
external R packages, and the names of the palettes were not necessarily
obvious. These functions have been updated to allow any choice of
colours, rather than restricting a user to a single package from which
to choose palettes.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`abacus()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/abacus.md) :
  Abacus
- [`black_hole()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/black_hole.md)
  : Black Hole
- [`blending()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/blending.md) :
  Blending
- [`boxes()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/boxes.md) : Boxes
- [`bricks()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/bricks.md) :
  Bricks
- [`bubbles()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/bubbles.md) :
  Bubbles
- [`bullseye()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/bullseye.md) :
  Bullseye
- [`chaos()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/chaos.md) : Chaos
- [`crosshatch()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/crosshatch.md)
  : Crosshatch
- [`disarray()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/disarray.md) :
  Disarray
- [`distort()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/distort.md) :
  Distort
- [`divide()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/divide.md) :
  Divide
- [`fading()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/fading.md) :
  Fading
- [`fractals()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/fractals.md) :
  Fractals
- [`fragmentum()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/fragmentum.md)
  : Fragmentum
- [`gradients()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/gradients.md)
  : Generates generative art as a grid of gradient colour fades
- [`lockers()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/lockers.md) :
  Draw a generative locker-grid plot
- [`mesh()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/mesh.md) : Mesh
- [`mirrored()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/mirrored.md) :
  Mirrored
- [`mosaic()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/mosaic.md) :
  Mosaic
- [`network()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/network.md) :
  Network
- [`perpendicular()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/perpendicular.md)
  : Perpendicular
- [`polygons()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/polygons.md) :
  Polygons
- [`puzzles()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/puzzles.md) :
  Puzzles
- [`rectangles()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/rectangles.md)
  : Rectangles
- [`riley()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/riley.md) : Riley
- [`rings()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/rings.md) : Rings
- [`riso()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/riso.md) : Riso
- [`shatter()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/shatter.md) :
  Shatter
- [`smudge()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/smudge.md) :
  Smudge
- [`squares()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/squares.md) :
  Squares
- [`stack()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/stack.md) : Stack
- [`stackture()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/stackture.md)
  : Stackture
- [`tiles()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/tiles.md) : Tiles
- [`vortex()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/vortex.md) :
  Vortex
- [`wander()`](https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/reference/wander.md) :
  Wander
